channel.title: Frontity template in codesandbox UI
channel.description:
# [Frontity Roadmap :biking_man:](https://www.notion.so/frontity/Frontity-Roadmap-e6fac9339a474031b2bc9fd90a075b69) **--- [Feature Card](https://www.notion.so/frontity/Frontity-template-in-codesandbox-UI-15961c0d7cbe4f2c9672e5370fe01320)**
## Description We should submit the template to make it appear in the codensandbox menu.
## User stories >As a **codesandbox user**, >I want to **start a Frontity project using a codesandbox template**, >so that I **don't have to look for the template in Google**.
## Possible solution Follow this guide -> https://github.com/codesandbox/codesandbox-client/blob/master/contributor-docs/adding-template.md

item.title: Frontity template in codesandbox UI
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Codesandbox has updated its templating system:

codesandbox.io

Say Hello to Template Universe and Goodbye to Project Setup - CodeSandbox Blog

Template Universe enables you to share and use templates created by the community and makes it possible for the maintainers of frameworks and libraries to add official ones too.

codesandbox.io

Templates - CodeSandbox Documentation

CodeSandbox allows you to create custom templates from sandboxes

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity template in codesandbox UI
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Frontity Roadmap

— Feature Card

Description

We should submit the template to make it appear in the codensandbox menu.

User stories

As a codesandbox user,
I want to start a Frontity project using a codesandbox template,
so that I don’t have to look for the template in Google.

Possible solution

Follow this guide -> https://github.com/codesandbox/codesandbox-client/blob/master/contributor-docs/adding-template.md

Read full topic
